overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk corporate facility, transitioning from narrow red-lit server corridors to a wide green-lit office space. The player interacts with a laptop device in a high-fidelity game environment with atmospheric neon lighting and industrial metal architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow server corridor with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor lined with server racks illuminated by red neon lights

entered.detail: tall black server racks with glowing red accent lights running vertically
tall black server racks with glowing red accent lights running vertically
ambient red neon illumination filling the corridor
metal grate flooring with diamond pattern
doorway at the end of the corridor leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, enclosed server corridor bathed in red neon light. Server racks line both sides of the metal grating floor, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere. The camera moves steadily forward toward a distant exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage area with corporate crates

events.description: exits narrow server corridor into wider industrial storage area

agents.ego_description: turning right and moving through a wider industrial space with large storage crates

entered.detail: large industrial crate with Arasaka corporation logo and branding
bright rectangular ceiling light panel providing white illumination
large equipment covered with red tarps or covers
tall window showing exterior cityscape or adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The player exits the narrow corridor into a wider industrial storage area with mixed lighting. Large Arasaka-branded crates dominate the center of the space, while red-covered equipment sits to the right. The lighting shifts from pure red neon to a mix of red accents and white overhead panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor leading to glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking through a darker corridor toward a set of glass doors

entered.detail: glass double doors with metal frames leading to another section
metal staircase leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: Moving through a darker corridor with red accent lighting, approaching a set of glass double doors. The Arasaka crate moves to the left as the player advances, and a staircase becomes visible in the far right. The environment feels more industrial and utilitarian.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open office lobby with green lighting

events.description: passes through glass doors into large open office space
lighting shifts dramatically from red to green cool tones

agents.ego_description: entering a large open office area with reflective floors and green ambient lighting

entered.detail: large open office space illuminated by green ceiling lights
white reception desk with red accents
shiny reflective marble or tile flooring showing light reflections
glass and metal office cubicle partitions
large potted plant with green foliage

segments.scene_description: The player passes through the glass doors into a dramatic new environment - a wide, open office lobby with highly reflective floors and cool green lighting. The atmosphere shifts completely from the claustrophobic red corridor to this spacious, modern office area with reception desks and glass partitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: office corner with equipment and laptop

events.description: approaches and interacts with laptop device on table

agents.ego_description: approaching a table with a laptop and interacting with the device, revealing a handgun

entered.detail: open laptop with glowing screen displaying data or interface
table covered with white sheet or tarp
furniture covered with white protective sheets

segments.scene_description: The player moves toward a corner of the office where a laptop sits open on a table. The camera approaches the device, and the player character interacts with it, momentarily revealing a handgun. The area contains furniture covered with white sheets and server racks in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plan office with multiple corridors

events.description: turns away from laptop and moves back into open office area

agents.ego_description: turning around and exploring the open office space, surveying multiple corridor entrances

entered.detail: central open area with multiple corridor entrances
papers and debris scattered on the floor

segments.scene_description: After interacting with the laptop, the player turns and moves back into the open office area, exploring the space. The camera pans across the green-lit lobby, showing multiple corridor entrances, scattered debris on the reflective floor, and the reception desk now closer on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, red-lit server corridor into a sprawling industrial storage and transit area. It begins by gliding forward through a narrow passage of server racks and metal grating bathed in intense red neon light. As the camera reaches the exit, the space opens into a wider storage hub where the lighting shifts from pure red to a mix of white overhead panels and red accents, surrounding large Arasaka-branded crates. The scene then transitions into a darker, utilitarian corridor, moving past the crates toward a set of glass double doors while a staircase emerges in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic red corridor into a spacious, green-lit corporate lobby. It begins as the camera passes through glass doors, instantly shifting from the narrow hallway into a wide office environment characterized by highly reflective floors and cool neon lighting. As the camera moves deeper into the space, it approaches a laptop open on a table amidst furniture covered in white sheets and distant server racks, momentarily revealing a handgun during the interaction. The scene then expands as the player turns away from the device to explore the open lobby, panning across scattered debris and passing a reception desk on the right. Finally, the camera surveys the broader area, revealing multiple corridor entrances that branch off from the luminous green hall.
